remarks.text: Kun vogn 18 benyttes til ind/udstigning fra Padborg St.
remarks.text_en: Boarding is only possible from coach 18 at Padborg St.

remarks.text: Toget kører til Hamburg. Du skal skifte i Padborg
remarks.text_en: This train is going toward Hamburg. You have to change in Padborg
